articles.title: WhatsApp says NSO targeted users with spearfishing attacks in violation of court order
articles.summary: WhatsApp said it is filing a federal court contempt order against NSO for violating a permanent injunction that bars it from mounting attacks against its users.

articles.title: Gogs patches critical zero-day enabling remote code execution
articles.summary: Gogs has patched a critical security zero-day flaw that can allow attackers to compromise Internet-facing instances and access any repositories (including private ones). [...]

articles.title: Critical UniFi OS bug lets hackers gain root without authentication
articles.summary: Attackers can chain three already fixed vulnerabilities in the Ubiquiti UniFi OS server to execute remote code with root privileges and without authentication. [...]

articles.summary: A China-nexus cyber espionage group has been observed deploying a BSD variant of a known backdoor called BRICKSTORM, as well as two other malware families codenamed PLENET (aka GRIMBOLT) and AGENTPSD to target Linux systems. articles.title: SolarWinds Serv-U Vulnerability Exploited in the Wild
articles.summary: Unauthenticated attackers can exploit the flaw via specially crafted POST requests that crash the Serv-U service. The post SolarWinds Serv-U Vulnerability Exploited in the Wild appeared first on SecurityWeek.

articles.summary: The social media giant has informed authorities about the impact of the recent attack involving an account recovery support tool. The post Meta Says 20,000 Instagram Accounts Hacked via AI Tool Abuse appeared first on SecurityWeek.

articles.title: Over 20,000 Instagram accounts stolen in Meta AI support hack
articles.summary: Meta has revealed that 20,225 Instagram users had their accounts hijacked in a recent incident where attackers used Meta's AI-powered support system to reset passwords. [...]

articles.title: OWASP Incubator Project Helps Developers Find and Fix Vulnerable Dependencies in Seconds
articles.summary: CVE Lite CLI is a free, open-source command line tool that scans your projects in seconds and tells you exactly which included packages contain a vulnerability. articles.title: Over 900 US gas station tank gauge systems exposed to attacks

articles.title: Hola Browser for Windows compromised to deliver cryptominer
articles.summary: The Windows version of the Hola Browser has been compromised in a supply chain attack that delivered an undeclared executable identified by researchers as a cryptocurrency miner. [...]
